_comment_top: Full v0.4.x test payload — every section, including the still-placeholder Related Parties (M6) and the read-only Proposed Email. All GUIDs are now real (verified from dev-system exports of countries, years, business activities, digital asset currencies, KYC properties + the supplied lead/contact). Drop into syg_aianalytics_audit on a test KYC profile and click Take over on each section.
_replace_these_guids: Country GUIDs (lookups in Personal Details + Source of Wealth + Detailed DA + Fiat Funds)
Business Activity GUIDs (M4 + Source of Wealth)
Year GUIDs (Source of Wealth + Detailed DA Holdings)
Digital Asset (token) GUIDs (Detailed DA + Planned DA Funds)
KYC Property GUIDs (Related Party Type, PEP Level)
Customer GUIDs (Fiat Funds client, DA Funds customer, Related Parties, email recipient)

findings.title: Inheritance dated before documented family liquidity event
findings.detail: Client states inheritance from grandfather in 2014 (CHF 1.2M). Public records show grandfather's holding company was sold in 2017 — three years AFTER the claimed inheritance. Source documentation should clarify the timing.

findings.title: Distant relative flagged as foreign domestic PEP
findings.detail: Second cousin holds a regional political position in Lombardy. Below FINMA-defined PEP proximity threshold; no client-side mitigation required.

proposedClientEmail.subject: Additional documentation request — KYC review
proposedClientEmail.body:
Dear Mr. Rossi,

As part of our ongoing KYC review we'd like to clarify two points:

  1. The timing of the 2014 family inheritance relative to the 2017 sale of Rossi Industries S.r.l. — please share the will or notarial deed.

  2. Supporting documentation for the planned BTC inbound transfer of 5 BTC from your self-custody wallet (recent custody chain or hardware-wallet attestation is sufficient).

Kind regards,
Sygnum Compliance

personalDetails._note: Phase 1 v0.4.2: Personal Details section is dropped from the UI. The agent may still ship this; the PCF parses but ignores it. Keeping in payload so re-enabling later is no-op.

professionalExperience.syg_ProfessionalExperienceSummary: Mr. Rossi has 20+ years of leadership experience in industrial manufacturing and asset management. CEO of Rossi Industries S.r.l. (2003–2018), the family-owned precision-engineering business, which he led through a 2018 majority sale to a Swiss private-equity buyer. Since 2019, Senior Partner at Sygnum AG advising HNW clients on digital asset allocation strategies. Holds an MBA from IMD Lausanne (2002) and engineering degree from Politecnico di Milano (1996).

relatedParties._comment: Existing related party — agent shipped GUID via R-A. Renders in M6 UI when shipped.
NEW related party — no Dataverse record yet. M6 PCF creates the contact at takeover with new_typeofcontact = 9, then writes the junction.

financialSituationNarrative: Net worth of CHF 12.5M is supported primarily by the 2018 sale of Rossi Industries S.r.l. (CHF 8.5M proceeds), accumulated salary as Senior Partner at Sygnum AG (CHF 2.8M cumulative 2019–2025), and a 2014 family inheritance (CHF 1.2M). Asset base is well-diversified across cash, equities, fixed income, real estate, and a 15% allocation to digital assets including a long-held BTC position acquired 2017–2020.

totalWealthIncome._note: Phase 1 v0.4.2: only syg_TimeframeforWealthAccumulation is rendered/written. The picklist totalwealth + annualincome are dropped from UI. The CHF money field moved under currentAssetAllocation.

sourceOfWealth.narrative: Three primary sources fully account for current net worth: (1) sale of family manufacturing business in 2018, (2) accumulated salary at Sygnum AG since 2019, (3) family inheritance received 2014. Each is documented; corroboration percentages range from 87% to 96%.

items.syg_description: Sold 60% stake in family precision-engineering business to Swiss private-equity buyer.
items.syg_rationale: Documented via Share Purchase Agreement (notarised 2018-09-14) and Italian tax filings for FY2018. Buy-out structured as cash + 5-year earn-out (earn-out concluded 2023).
items.syg_supportinginformation: SPA dated 2018-09-14, Italian Notary Deed N. 4521/2018. Tax filings: Modello Redditi PF 2019 declaring capital gain of EUR 7.4M.

items.syg_description: Senior Partner role; cumulative net salary plus partner-distribution received 2019 onward.
items.syg_rationale: Internal payroll records 2019–2025 reconcile to net amount.
items.syg_supportinginformation: Sygnum HR payroll export, employment contract dated 2019-01-15.

items.syg_description: Received 1/3 share of paternal grandfather's estate.
items.syg_rationale: Inheritance documented via Italian succession deed. Note: see Findings — grandfather's holding company sold three years AFTER claimed inheritance; clarification requested.

digitalAssetHoldingsNarrative: DA allocation of 15% (CHF 1.875M) reflects a long-held BTC position acquired primarily 2017–2020 (avg cost CHF 8.2k, current value CHF 1.45M), plus an ETH staking position with Sygnum since 2021 (CHF 425k). Both positions documented via on-chain proofs and custody attestations.

detailedDAHoldings.syg_currentcustody: Self-custody (Ledger hardware wallet, multi-sig with family member)
detailedDAHoldings.syg_description: Position acquired in tranches via Bitstamp 2017–2018 (CHF ~6k avg) and via licensed OTC desk 2019–2020 (CHF ~12k avg). Held in cold storage since 2020.
detailedDAHoldings.syg_originoffunds: Initial purchases funded from cash savings; later tranches funded from sale-of-business proceeds (2018).

detailedDAHoldings.syg_currentcustody: Sygnum Bank custody — staked under Sygnum staking program
detailedDAHoldings.syg_originoffunds: Acquired via Sygnum AG salary-sacrifice arrangement 2021–2023.

transactionalBehaviour: Expected monthly transactional volume: CHF 50k–150k via fiat rails (regular living expenses, asset rebalancing). Quarterly DA rebalancing in the 5–15 BTC range. No third-party transfers anticipated except direct family (spouse account, 2 children's accounts). High-value asset purchases (real estate, art) handled separately via dedicated transactions with full documentation.

plannedFiatFunds.syg_name: Initial deposit — UBS to Sygnum CHF account

plannedDAFunds.syg_remarks: Tranche of long-held BTC position; remaining ~13.5 BTC stays in self-custody.

pepSanctionsRisk.syg_pepderivationdetails: Screening performed against Dow Jones Risk and World-Check One on 2026-04-29. Returned no PEP matches at level 1, 2, or 3. Second-cousin's regional-political role flagged at level 4 (below FINMA proximity threshold) and recorded in Findings for transparency.
pepSanctionsRisk.syg_mediascreeningandreputationalriskcom: World-Check + LexisNexis + ComplyAdvantage screen on 2026-04-30. No adverse media findings. Italian-language press search 2014–2026 returned only positive coverage of Rossi Industries S.r.l. business activities.
pepSanctionsRisk.syg_sanctioncheckcomment: Cleared — OFAC, EU, UK, SECO consolidated lists checked 2026-04-30. No matches.

additionalComments: Long-standing client relationship via Sygnum AG employment (since 2019). All documentation reviewed by Compliance lead Anna Schmid and ratified 2026-04-30. Recommend annual review cadence given moderate risk score and DA exposure.
